bio: Ali-Asghar Badizadegan was an engineer and one of the three co-founders of the [Mojahedin-e Khalq](/orgs/mojahedin-e-khalq) alongside [Mohammad Hanifnejad](/people/mohammad-hanifnejad) and [Saeed Mohsen](/people/saeed-mohsen). He helped establish the MEK's intellectual foundations, blending progressive Islamic thought with revolutionary theory. He was arrested by SAVAK in 1971 and executed on 25 May 1972.
editorial_notes: Executed by Shah's regime. Exact birth year uncertain.
